input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javaTest failure appears to be a behavior/expectation mismatch in the existing ObjectPropertyAccessor test when run against 3.3.5, not a missing external setup problem.

SecurityManager-related APIs are deprecated/removed on newer JDKs, so tests that exercise OGNL security-manager paths may need to be version-aware, but this is test logic rather than deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-memory Java expression/property navigation library; its only runtime dependency for 3.3.5 is transitive Javassist, and meaningful tests do not require Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or environment/system properties beyond the existing test scaffold.
